case_title: GRAHAM MOORE VS. VICTOR ALIKIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANDLER PROPERTIES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SAMANTHA C. DIVGELL--PROPERTY MANAGER/AGENT FOR THE OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, GRAHAM DBA GRAHAM MOORE CONSTRUCTION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALIKIN, VICTOR CHANDLER PROPERTIES $3,015.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,065.00, BOTH DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2014 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ALIKIN, VICTOR

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,662.12 FILED BY MOORE, GRAHAM DBA GRAHAM MOORE CONSTRUCTION AS TO DEFENDANT ALIKIN, VICTOR CHANDLER PROPERTIES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
